privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic dataset of 23 household items for a garage sale pricing exercise. The CSV data is created inline in setup_task.sh and contains 7 categories: Furniture (5 items), Electronics (3), Appliances (4), Kitchen Items (3), Decor (3), Sports Equipment (3), and Clothing (2). Pricing is condition-based: Excellent condition items are priced at 80% of market value, Good at 65%, and Fair at 45%. An additional 20% discount applies to bulky items (Furniture and Appliances), resulting in 9 discounted items. A minimum price of $1.00 is enforced on all items. The expected total projected revenue is $1845.05. The task requires passing 70% of 6 verification criteria, with $0.50 tolerance allowed in the final revenue sum.
